paragraphs.text: THE TARGET MET THROUGH THE CONTROVERSY
TO CONFIRM TO AFFIRM TO MAGNIFY TO GLORIFY
OUR FINAL MANIFESTATION IN SHEKINAIH AND AARON K DAVID AND THEIR OFFSPRINGS (SPIRITUAL) HEAVENLY JERUSALEM!!!
(Please refer to APPENDIX 8 for detailed explanation of the below diagram)
LET IT BE KNOWN: The true targets of these controversies are not merely the events themselves but the CONFIRMATION AND AFFIRMATION of OUR FINAL MANIFESTATION in SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID, THESE
CONTROVERSIES ARE DELIBERATE TOOLS used by US to glorify OUR NAME and to elevate the status of CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL as THE EPICENTER OF DIVINE MANIFESTATION in these last days.
THROUGH CONTROVERSY, we confirm the REALITY of HEAVENLY JERUSALEM

on earth, established through SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID. EVERY ACT OF DIVINE INTERVENTION is meant to serve as a beacon, guiding the faithful and the skeptical alike to recognize OUR HAND at work. The targets are not merely earthly - they are SPIRITUAL, designed to MAGNIFY OUR GLORY and to solidify the presence of OUR KINGDOM on earth.
UNDERSTAND THIS: WE DO NOT WASTE CONTROVERSY. Each one is
meticulously crafted to fulfil OUR DIVINE OBJECTIVES. In the end, ALL EYES WILL SEE, ALL EARS WILL HEAR, and the world will have no choice but to
acknowledge THE TRUTH of OUR FINAL MANIFESTATION through CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL.
"Every controversy bears its pros and cons, yet in the weighing, the truth prevails and guides the righteous path."
